---
title: "Quality control of C.elegans data"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tximport)
library(rtracklayer)
library(DESeq2)
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(ggplot2)

samples <- c(
  "K002000093_54873", "K002000093_54875", "K002000093_54877", 
  "K002000093_54879", "K002000093_54881", "K002000093_54883", 
  "K002000093_54885", "K002000093_54887", "K002000093_54889", 
  "K002000244_89704", "K002000244_89706", "K002000244_89708", 
  "K002000244_89710", "K002000244_89712", "K002000244_89714")

names(samples) <- c(
  "wt", "wt", "wt", "ama1", "ama1", "ama1", 
  "daf2", "daf2", "daf2", "wtday1", "wtday1", "wtday1", 
  "ama1day1", "ama1day1", "ama1day1")

common_path <- '/cellfile/datapublic/ahyseni/cryption/c.elegans/docker/salmon_quant/output'

# reading in the salmon quantification files, e.g.: /cellfile/datapublic/ahyseni/cryption/c.elegans/docker/salmon_quant/output/wt/K002000093_54873/quant.sf

quant_filepaths <- file.path(common_path, names(samples), samples, "quant.sf")


sampleTable <- data.frame(
  sampleName = samples,
  fileName = quant_filepaths,
  condition = names(samples))

sampleTable$condition <- factor(sampleTable$condition, levels = unique(names(samples)))

new_conditions <- c(
  "wt_old", "wt_old", "wt_old",
  "ama1_old", "ama1_old", "ama1_old",
  "daf2_old", "daf2_old", "daf2_old",
  "wt_young", "wt_young", "wt_young",
  "ama1_young", "ama1_young", "ama1_young"
)

sampleTable <- data.frame(
  sampleName = samples,
  fileName = quant_filepaths,
  condition = new_conditions
)

sampleTable$condition <- factor(sampleTable$condition, levels = unique(new_conditions))

# load transcript-gene csv
tx2gene1 <- read.csv("/cellfile/datapublic/ahyseni/cryption/c.elegans/data/reference_omes/tx2gene.csv")

# import Salmon data and summarize to genes
txi <- tximport(quant_filepaths, type = "salmon", tx2gene = tx2gene1, ignoreTxVersion = TRUE)

make_dds_and_plot <- function(df, capt) {

  #if (setequal(df, txi_major) == T) {
    #main = 'PCA for C. elegans RNA-seq (major transcripts)'
  #} else {
  main = 'PCA for C. elegans RNA-seq'

  # Create DESeq2 dataset
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(df, colData = sampleTable, design = ~condition)
  
  # remove genes with very low counts
  dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds)) > 5, ]
  
  # run DESeq normalization
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE, nsub = 700)
  
  pcaData <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition", returnData = TRUE)
  percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pcaData, "percentVar"))

  ggplot(pcaData, aes(PC1, PC2, color = condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  ggtitle(main) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) +
  labs(caption = capt) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),  # Increase axis title size
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),   # Increase axis text size
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0)  # Increase title size and make it bold
  )
}


major_transcript_genes <- readRDS('/cellfile/datapublic/ahyseni/cryption/c.elegans/results/major_transcript_genes.rds')


# subset the txi counts and metadata to only include major transcripts
txi_major <- txi
txi_major$counts <- txi_major$counts[rownames(txi_major$counts) %in% major_transcript_genes, ]
txi_major$abundance <- txi_major$abundance[rownames(txi_major$abundance) %in% major_transcript_genes, ]
txi_major$length <- txi_major$length[rownames(txi_major$length) %in% major_transcript_genes, ]


make_dds_and_plot(txi, '')
make_dds_and_plot(txi_major, 'Fig. 2: PCA plot for major transcripts reads')
```
